title: atractylis carduus
intro: Atractylis carduus, also known as the thistle thistle or milfoil, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Atractylis carduus stem from its sesquiterpene lactone compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure. Atractylis carduus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
